title.zh: 嵌入式软件工程师｜C / Linux / 设备通信
title.en: Embedded Software Engineer · C / Linux / Device Connectivity

summary.zh: 3 年以上嵌入式与物联网研发经验，聚焦 C、Linux、MCU/RTOS 与设备通信。已形成从 Air780E/HC32 底层调试、4G 网关和多协议接入，到 Flutter 跨端 APP、物联网平台与客户部署的完整实践；能够承担协议设计、功能开发、联调诊断、稳定性优化和交付闭环。
summary.en: Embedded and IoT engineer with 3+ years of experience focused on C, Linux, MCU/RTOS, and device connectivity. Hands-on from Air780E/HC32 debugging and multi-protocol 4G gateways through Flutter apps, IoT platforms, and customer deployments, covering protocol design, implementation, integration, reliability work, and delivery closure.

availability.zh: 寻求嵌入式软件、设备通信与物联网方向机会
availability.en: Seeking embedded software, device connectivity, and IoT opportunities

title.zh: 从底层让设备稳定运行
title.en: Make devices reliable from the foundation

body.zh: 围绕 C、FreeRTOS、RT-Thread、LWIP、USART 与 DMA，完成设备侧开发、调试与通信验证。
body.en: Build, debug, and validate device-side connectivity with C, FreeRTOS, RT-Thread, LWIP, USART, and DMA.

title.zh: 把多协议收敛为可维护链路
title.en: Turn multiple protocols into maintainable paths

body.zh: 在 TCP、UDP、MQTT、RS485、USB、BLE 与 SPP 之间完成协议设计、适配、联调与问题定位。
body.en: Design, adapt, integrate, and diagnose flows across TCP, UDP, MQTT, RS485, USB, BLE, and SPP.

title.zh: 把设备能力交给真实用户
title.en: Put device capabilities in users’ hands

body.zh: 通过 Flutter、Android 原生与设备通信桥接，支撑 Android、iOS 与 HarmonyOS 端交付。
body.en: Use Flutter, native Android, and device bridges to support Android, iOS, and HarmonyOS delivery.

title.zh: 把现场方案沉淀为可运营系统
title.en: Turn field solutions into operable systems

body.zh: 通过 Go、Vue 3、数据存储与部署文档，将设备能力沉淀为可维护、可持续迭代的平台。
body.en: Use Go, Vue 3, data storage, and deployment documentation to turn device capabilities into maintainable platforms.

title.zh: 嵌入式开发与实时系统
通信与协议
应用与平台工程
调试、测试与交付

company.zh: 北京软石智控科技有限公司

role.zh: 嵌入式软件开发工程师

summary.zh: 围绕嵌入式控制器、4G 网关、跨端 APP 与集中控制平台持续研发，职责由底层通信和设备联调扩展到平台功能、跨端发布、客户部署与长期运维，覆盖产品从方案设计到交付迭代的完整周期。
summary.en: Develop embedded controllers, 4G gateways, cross-platform apps, and centralized control systems. Responsibilities have grown from low-level connectivity and device integration into platform features, multi-platform releases, customer deployments, and long-term operations across the full product lifecycle.

bullets.zh:
- 负责 Air780E、HC32 与 Linux 网关相关开发调试，完成 RTOS / LWIP、USART / DMA、FOTA 及多任务、内存问题定位。
- 实现并维护 MQTT、TCP/UDP、RS485、USB、BLE/SPP 等链路，覆盖接入、指令/状态、文件传输、定时与远控，并处理重连、粘包、断点续传和内存泄漏。
- 参与集中控制平台与 Flutter APP 核心功能开发，打通网关、强电设备、移动端和平台的端到端交互。
- 完成 Android / iOS / HarmonyOS 适配发布及多个客户环境部署升级，承担问题闭环、销售培训和中英文协议/说明书沉淀。
bullets.en:
- Developed and debugged Air780E, HC32, and Linux gateway software, including RTOS/LWIP, USART/DMA, FOTA, multitasking, and memory diagnosis.
- Implemented and stabilized MQTT, TCP/UDP, RS485, USB, and BLE/SPP paths for onboarding, commands, telemetry, files, schedules, and remote control, resolving reconnect, framing, resumable-transfer, and memory-leak issues.
- Contributed core features to the centralized platform and Flutter app, connecting gateways, power-control devices, mobile clients, and cloud workflows.
- Delivered Android, iOS, and HarmonyOS adaptations plus customer deployments/upgrades, issue closure, training, and bilingual protocol/manual documentation.

title.zh: 4G 单灯控制器与云端管控平台

summary.zh: 面向分布式照明设备的 4G 单灯控制与云端管理系统，覆盖设备接入、MQTT 通信、远程控制、状态监测、地图分组、节目下发与运行审计。
summary.en: A device-to-cloud management and control platform for distributed 4G single-lamp controllers, covering onboarding, MQTT connectivity, remote control, telemetry, map grouping, program delivery, and operational auditing.

role.zh: 设备通信与物联网平台工程师

background.zh: 分布式单灯设备需要通过 4G 接入云端，实现单灯、分组与广播控制；同时需要统一管理设备激活、GPS 定位、运行状态和节目下发，降低现场维护与控制链路的复杂度。
background.en: Distributed lamp controllers need cloud access over 4G for single-device, group, and broadcast control, while onboarding, GPS location, telemetry, and program delivery must remain manageable through one operational path.

actions.zh:
- 参与技术选型与系统架构设计，整理 JSON / MQTT 协议，并开发控制器模拟器验证注册、主题分配、指令控制和文件下发流程。
- 开发项目、网关、设备、分组、地图、MQTT 主题、测试指令、文件与日志等后台主体功能。
- 参与开发可运行于服务器的网关实例，基本实现设备列表、分组列表、状态读取以及单设备/分组/全部设备的分主题核心指令控制。
- 设计文件下发链路：MQTT 传递任务、进度与结果，设备通过 HTTP/HTTPS 下载，并结合 MD5、SHA-256 校验与原子替换保护本地文件。
- 参与 Spring Boot、Vue 3、PostgreSQL/PostGIS、Redis、EMQX 与 MinIO 组成的云端环境部署和运行保障。
actions.en:
- Contributed to technology selection and system architecture, defined JSON/MQTT contracts, and built a controller simulator for registration, topic assignment, commands, and file-delivery flows.
- Developed the main management workflows for projects, gateways, devices, groups, maps, MQTT topics, test commands, files, and operational logs.
- Brought the core server-hosted gateway flow to a working stage for device/group lists, state reads, and topic-scoped commands to individual, grouped, or all devices.
- Designed file delivery so MQTT carries tasks, progress, and results while devices download over HTTP/HTTPS with MD5/SHA-256 verification and atomic replacement.
- Supported deployment and operations across Spring Boot, Vue 3, PostgreSQL/PostGIS, Redis, EMQX, and MinIO.

results.zh:
- 已贯通“注册申请 → 主题分配 → 控制下发 → 状态回传 → 文件下载”的主体流程，并完成单设备与多设备文件下发测试。
- 模拟器、管理后台与网关实例的核心链路已能够协同运行，项目进入界面与交互持续优化阶段。
- 覆盖 4G、MQTT、HTTP/HTTPS、GPS，以及电压、电流、温度、电量、亮度、帧率、节目、SIM 与信号强度等状态模型。
results.en:
- Connected the main flow from registration and topic assignment through command delivery, telemetry, and file download, including single- and multi-device file-delivery tests.
- Brought the simulator, management backend, and gateway instance into an integrated core workflow; UI and interaction refinement remain in progress.
- Covered 4G, MQTT, HTTP/HTTPS, GPS, and state models for voltage, current, temperature, energy, brightness, frame rate, program, SIM, and signal strength.

title.zh: 物联网集中控制平台

summary.zh: 为 Linux 嵌入式设备提供统一接入、集中控制、数据采集与文件下发的管理平台。
summary.en: A management platform for unified onboarding, centralized control, telemetry, and file delivery across embedded Linux devices.

role.zh: 设备与平台软件工程师

background.zh: 平台需要统一管理网关、强弱电设备、节目与场景，并支撑多客户环境中的部署、升级和持续运营。
background.en: The platform needed unified management of gateways, power-control devices, media, and scenes while remaining deployable and maintainable across multiple customer environments.

actions.zh:
- 参与 Vue 3 前端、Go 接口与设备控制功能开发，完善网关搜索、批量多回路控制、强电回路、节目、权限和场景演绎等能力。
- 建设节目上传、FTP 下载、视频切割与临时播放链路，持续解决文件丢失、切割失败和设备播放异常。
- 开发网关信息、开关控制、心跳间隔和能耗数据接口，并实现按小时、日期、分时与分天展示的电量统计。
- 负责测试环境与客户环境部署升级，处理数据库、SSH、磁盘、设备掉线和新设备接入等运行问题。
- 整理 API、部署说明和中英文操作手册，配合客户部署、交付支持、销售培训与需求迭代。
actions.en:
- Contributed Vue 3 frontend, Go APIs, and device-control features for gateway search, batch circuit control, power circuits, media, permissions, and scene orchestration.
- Built media upload, FTP download, video slicing, and temporary playback flows, resolving lost files, slicing failures, and device playback issues.
- Implemented gateway, switch-control, heartbeat, and energy APIs with hourly, daily, time-of-use, and per-day energy views.
- Deployed and upgraded test and customer environments, handling database, SSH, disk, device-offline, and new-device onboarding issues.
- Maintained APIs, deployment guides, and bilingual operating manuals while supporting customer deployments, delivery, training, and requirements iteration.

results.zh:
- 完成场景演绎、能耗统计、强电回路管理和多设备控制等核心功能的开发与持续交付。
- 支持多个客户环境完成平台部署、升级与问题闭环，并形成可复用的部署说明和使用资料。
- 完成场景演绎中英文支持与平台科技主题重构，补充节目缩略图、视频分辨率处理等运营能力。
results.en:
- Delivered and iterated core capabilities including scene orchestration, energy analytics, power-circuit management, and multi-device control.
- Supported deployment, upgrades, and issue closure across multiple customer environments with reusable deployment and operating documentation.
- Added bilingual scene orchestration, rebuilt the platform's technical visual theme, and added media thumbnails and video-resolution handling.

title.zh: 跨端 4G 设备管理 APP

summary.zh: 面向远程、本地有线和近场无线场景，提供设备管理、文件传输与远程升级能力。
summary.en: Provides device management, file transfer, and remote upgrade workflows across remote, local wired, and nearby wireless scenarios.

background.zh: 同一设备需要同时覆盖远程、本地有线和近场无线三类控制场景。
background.en: The same device needed consistent control across remote, local wired, and nearby wireless scenarios.

actions.zh:
- 接手 Flutter 工程与 Android/iOS 构建环境，适配原生 SDK、动态库和静态库，持续完成版本编译与发布。
- 开发远程控制、USB 脱机控制、SPP/BLE 通信、文件上传下载、断点续传、一键上传和设备升级流程。
- 优化 USB 反复插拔、传输中断重连、线程阻塞、Token 过期、页面卡顿和 UI 触摸等稳定性问题。
- 完成中英文、多域名与自定义地址支持，并针对 Android、iOS、HarmonyOS 的权限、深色模式和系统差异进行适配。
actions.en:
- Took over the Flutter project and Android/iOS build environments, adapting native SDKs, dynamic libraries, and static libraries for ongoing releases.
- Built remote control, USB offline control, SPP/BLE communication, upload/download, resumable transfer, one-click upload, and device-upgrade workflows.
- Improved reliability across repeated USB reconnects, interrupted transfers, thread blocking, token expiry, page stalls, and touch handling.
- Added bilingual UI, multi-domain/custom-address support, and Android, iOS, and HarmonyOS adaptation for permissions, dark mode, and platform differences.

results.zh:
- 完成 Android、iOS、HarmonyOS 三端适配，并参与 Android 厂商应用商店、Apple App Store 与鸿蒙应用市场发布。
- 已形成远程与 USB 脱机控制、文件传输、设备升级和异常恢复主流程；Android SPP 蓝牙通信基本完成，iOS BLE 脱机通信仍按版本推进。
results.en:
- Completed Android, iOS, and HarmonyOS adaptation and contributed releases to Android vendor stores, Apple App Store, and the HarmonyOS app marketplace.
- Established the main remote and USB-offline workflows for file transfer, upgrades, and recovery; Android SPP was substantially complete while iOS BLE offline communication continued by release.

title.zh: 嵌入式 4G 网关

summary.zh: 面向上位平台与强弱电设备的多协议 Linux 网关，提供通信转发、联动控制和本地管理能力。
summary.en: A multi-protocol Linux gateway for cloud platforms and power-control devices, providing communication routing, coordinated control, and local management.

background.zh: 现有硬件需要演进为支持多通信通道、场景联动和本地数据管理的网关产品。
background.en: Existing hardware needed to evolve into a gateway product supporting multiple communication paths, scene coordination, and local data management.

actions.zh:
- 参与需求梳理、架构和协议设计，在 SD72 / GW01 上实现 MQTT、UDP、RS485、强电控制与设备数据采集。
- 开发 U 盘与远程升级、进度上报、GPS 授时/定位、定时同步、操作日志、网络与域名设置以及防错误升级。
- 设计多场景、多时间轴、多事件演绎控制，使 485、UDP、MQTT 和强电事件能够按时间联动执行。
- 增加电表数据读取/上传、主从网关转发、集中控制接口与远程控制适配，并参与客户协议对接。
- 排查时区、节日定时、内存泄漏、长期运行通信失效、485 丢包与系统自动重启等稳定性问题。
actions.en:
- Contributed requirements, architecture, and protocol design and implemented MQTT, UDP, RS485, power control, and device acquisition on SD72/GW01 hardware.
- Built USB and remote upgrades, progress reporting, GPS time/location, schedule sync, operational logs, network/domain settings, and safeguards against invalid upgrades.
- Designed multi-scene, multi-timeline orchestration so RS485, UDP, MQTT, and power events execute against a shared timeline.
- Added meter acquisition/upload, primary-secondary gateway forwarding, centralized-control APIs, and remote-control adaptation while supporting customer protocol integration.
- Diagnosed timezone, holiday schedule, memory leak, long-running communication, RS485 packet-loss, and automatic-restart issues.

results.zh:
- 在 SD72 / GW01 硬件上完成网关核心功能开发测试，并持续接入集中控制平台和远程 APP。
- 支持客户网关协议与强电模块对接，完成部署适配、问题定位和长期版本迭代。
results.en:
- Delivered and tested gateway core functionality on SD72/GW01 hardware with ongoing integration into the centralized platform and remote app.
- Supported customer gateway protocols and power-module integration through deployment adaptation, diagnosis, and long-term releases.

title.zh: Air780E / HC32 通信与 RTOS 调试

summary.zh: 围绕 Cat.1 联网、MCU 与 4G 模块通信，完成网络能力验证与调试问题闭环。
summary.en: Validated Cat.1 networking and MCU-to-4G-module communication, closing the loop on key debugging issues.

background.zh: 项目需要验证模块网络能力、FOTA 流程，并解决 HC32 与 Air780E 的 IP 包和多任务调试问题。
background.en: The project required network and FOTA validation while resolving IP packet and multitasking issues between HC32 and Air780E.

actions.zh:
- 验证 Air780E 的 TCP/UDP、HTTP/HTTPS、DNS、硬件流控与上下行传输，并配合模块厂商和运营商定位物联网卡链路问题。
- 设计 Air780E 与 HC32 串口消息结构，在 HC32 侧整合 FreeRTOS、RT-Thread、LWIP、USART 与 DMA，完成 IP/TCP 包处理。
- 完成 4G 模组 FOTA、电流与内存布局测试，并使用 J-Link、GDB、OpenOCD、Ozone、SysView 分析中断、任务切换和调试异常。
actions.en:
- Validated Air780E TCP/UDP, HTTP/HTTPS, DNS, hardware flow control, and uplink/downlink behavior while coordinating with module and carrier support on IoT-SIM issues.
- Designed Air780E-HC32 serial messages and integrated FreeRTOS, RT-Thread, LWIP, USART, and DMA on HC32 for IP/TCP packet handling.
- Completed FOTA, current, and memory-layout tests and used J-Link, GDB, OpenOCD, Ozone, and SysView to diagnose interrupts, task switches, and debugger failures.

results.zh:
- 使 4G 链路达到测试使用要求，完成 RAW API TCP 通信、FOTA 流程与多块样机验证。
- 建立模组与 MCU 间的数据交互链路，并解决 J-Link 调试阻塞问题，沉淀开发与调试文档。
results.en:
- Brought the 4G path to the required test level and completed RAW API TCP, FOTA, and multi-board validation.
- Established module-to-MCU data exchange, resolved the J-Link debugging blocker, and documented development and debugging workflows.

title.zh: 上位机与音视频工具

summary.zh: 围绕 DXF 处理、音视频同步、实时帧输出和动画控制持续优化上位机工具。
summary.en: Continually improved desktop tooling for DXF processing, audio-video synchronization, real-time frame output, and animation control.

background.zh: 旧有工具在图形处理效率、跨平台音视频同步和特定演示控制上需要持续优化。
background.en: Legacy tooling needed improvements in geometry throughput, cross-platform synchronization, and specialized visual control.

actions.zh:
- 使用 C# 解析 ELF 符号与来源文件，并研究通过 OpenOCD 实现下载和调试工具。
- 基于 FFmpeg 实现音频输出、音视频同步、指定帧跳转/播放，封装 Windows DLL 并移植 FFplay 至 Linux / SD70。
- 使用 VB6 与 Python 处理 DXF 线段分割，针对大量布线持续优化执行效率，并解决图像旋转与内存泄漏问题。
actions.en:
- Parsed ELF symbols and source references in C# and investigated OpenOCD-backed download and debugging tooling.
- Implemented audio output, A/V sync, and frame seeking/playback with FFmpeg, packaged Windows DLLs, and ported FFplay to Linux/SD70.
- Built DXF line segmentation with VB6 and Python, tuned large-layout performance, and resolved image-rotation and memory-leak issues.

results.zh:
- 音视频能力完成上位机集成，并解决版本适配、崩溃与播放同步问题。
- DXF 与图像处理工具经过多轮性能和稳定性优化，可支撑实际工程文件处理。
results.en:
- Integrated media capabilities into the desktop product and resolved version, crash, and playback-synchronization issues.
- Improved DXF and image tooling through multiple performance and reliability iterations for production engineering files.

title.zh: 产品文档与 Dify 知识库

summary.zh: 将产品说明书、技术资料和常见问题整合为在线资料平台与智能问答入口。
summary.en: An online documentation platform and intelligent Q&A entry built from manuals, technical references, and FAQs.

role.zh: 资料平台与知识库工程师

background.zh: 客户、销售与售后需要更快定位产品资料，减少重复答疑。
background.en: Customers, sales, and support teams needed faster access to product knowledge with less repeated manual assistance.

actions.zh:
- 建设产品说明书在线/离线平台，整理并上传产品资料，补充文件下载和视频播放能力。
- 验证 DeepSeek 本地部署与 API，评估云端知识库方案，并基于华为云与 Dify 构建产品说明书知识库。
- 引入文档处理模型优化资料解析与回答效果，并将知识库 API 接入 Flutter APP。
actions.en:
- Built online/offline product documentation with organized manuals, file downloads, and video playback.
- Validated local DeepSeek deployment and APIs, assessed cloud knowledge-base options, and built the product-manual knowledge base with Huawei Cloud and Dify.
- Added document-processing models to improve ingestion and responses and integrated the knowledge-base API into the Flutter app.

results.zh:
- 形成从在线说明书、资料下载到智能问答的产品知识入口，并完成移动端调用链路。
- 为客户、销售与售后提供统一的资料检索与问答入口。
results.en:
- Created a product-knowledge entry spanning online manuals, downloads, and intelligent Q&A with a completed mobile integration path.
- Provided a unified retrieval and Q&A entry for customers, sales, and support.

title.zh: Android 与嵌入式设备通信

summary.zh: 核心开发阶段完成 Android 原生 APP、Linux 设备和中继服务之间的 USB、蓝牙与 TCP 多通道通信。
summary.en: During the core development phase, connected a native Android app, Linux devices, and relay services over USB, Bluetooth, and TCP.

role.zh: Android 应用与设备通信工程师

background.zh: 设备需要同时覆盖本地有线、近场无线与 TCP 中继控制，并在脱机控制、文件传输和异常恢复场景中保持通信稳定。
background.en: The device needed local wired, nearby wireless, and TCP-relayed control with reliable communication across offline control, file transfer, and failure recovery.

actions.zh:
- 使用 Android Studio + Java 开发 USB CDC、BLE 与 SPP 通信，并实现 Android 端 TCP 中继服务。
- 将中继代码移植为 Android SO 库，配合 Linux 端 TCP 转 USB 服务打通设备、APP 与中继链路。
- 处理大文件传输粘包、USB 插拔、断线重连、锁屏、心跳和异常中断等稳定性问题。
actions.en:
- Built USB CDC, BLE, and SPP communication in Android Studio/Java and implemented an Android-side TCP relay.
- Ported relay code into an Android shared library and connected it with a Linux TCP-to-USB service across device, app, and relay layers.
- Stabilized large-file framing, USB hot-plug, reconnects, lock-screen behavior, heartbeats, and interrupted transfers.

results.zh:
- 完成 Android APP、Linux 设备与中继服务之间的多通道数据交互。
- 解决大文件、插拔、心跳和异常恢复等关键问题，为后续脱机控制迭代建立通信基础。
results.en:
- Delivered multi-channel data exchange across the Android app, Linux devices, and relay services.
- Resolved key large-file, hot-plug, heartbeat, and recovery issues, establishing the communication base for later offline-control iterations.

title.zh: QEMU 虚拟平台

summary.zh: 在 Windows 中搭建 Cortex-A9 Linux 与 Cortex-M4 FreeRTOS 虚拟调试环境。
summary.en: Cortex-A9 Linux and Cortex-M4 FreeRTOS virtual debugging environments hosted on Windows.

background.zh: 需要在 Windows 环境中验证 ARM Linux 与 Cortex-M FreeRTOS 的启动、图形和调试能力。
background.en: ARM Linux and Cortex-M FreeRTOS startup, graphics, and debugging capabilities needed validation in a Windows-hosted environment.

actions.zh:
- 使用 QEMU 搭建 Cortex-A9 Linux 虚拟机并配置 SSH。
- 搭建 Cortex-M4 + FreeRTOS 环境，执行 Framebuffer 图像与任务启动测试。
- 配置 GDB 调试并验证运行流程。
actions.en:
- Built a Cortex-A9 Linux virtual machine in QEMU and configured SSH.
- Created a Cortex-M4 + FreeRTOS environment for framebuffer and task-start tests.
- Configured GDB and validated runtime behavior.

results.zh: 完成两类处理器虚拟平台的运行、调试与验证。
results.en: Completed runtime, debugging, and validation for two processor-family virtual platforms.

title.zh: LoRa 物联网智慧牧场

summary.zh: LoRa 自组织网络、Android APP 与 C# 上位机组成的环境监测与控制系统。
summary.en: Environmental monitoring and control built with a LoRa mesh, Android app, and C# desktop client.

background.zh: 项目面向智慧养殖场的环境监测与自动控制，通过 LoRa 自组织网络连接节点与网关，并由移动端和上位机完成集中管理。
background.en: The project targeted environmental monitoring and automated control for smart farming, connecting nodes and gateways through a LoRa mesh with mobile and desktop management.

actions.zh:
- 使用 Android Studio + Java 开发移动端状态显示与控制。
- 使用 .NET / C# 开发数据采集、存储、分析和设备控制上位机。
- 参与 LoRa 通信流程、Python 数据分析与技术文档整理。
actions.en:
- Built Android status and control workflows with Java.
- Developed a .NET/C# desktop client for acquisition, storage, analysis, and control.
- Contributed to LoRa connectivity, Python analysis, and technical documentation.

results.zh: 完成移动端、上位机与通信文档交付，并以第一作者发表两篇相关论文。
results.en: Delivered mobile, desktop, and communication documentation and published two related papers as first author.

title.zh: 冬奥会电梯测试软件

summary.zh: 连接信号仪、功率计与场强计的辐射参数测试和报表软件。
summary.en: Radiation parameter testing and reporting software integrating signal, power, and field-strength instruments.

background.zh: 测试流程需要统一连接信号仪、功率计和场强计，完成辐射参数设置、校准、采集、动态展示与报表导出。
background.en: The test workflow needed unified integration of signal, power, and field-strength instruments for configuration, calibration, acquisition, live display, and report export.

actions.zh:
- 使用 C# / .NET 开发仪器通信、参数设置、校准测试与数据采集。
- 实现单项与汇总数据动态展示、报表导出和机械装置远程控制。
- 负责界面、后端代码、项目测试和交付文档。
actions.en:
- Built instrument communication, parameter setup, calibration, and acquisition in C#/.NET.
- Implemented live single/aggregate views, report export, and remote mechanical control.
- Owned UI, backend code, testing, and delivery documentation.

results.zh: 三人项目小组完成测试软件开发并顺利交付。
results.en: Delivered the completed test application as part of a three-person team.

title.zh: 智慧仓储

summary.zh: 基于 ARM、Linux 与 C 的校内实训项目。
summary.en: An ARM, Linux, and C training project for smart warehouse management.

background.zh: 校内实训要求在 ARM 开发板上完成智慧仓储管理，覆盖从 Linux 系统到 Web 管理功能的完整链路。
background.en: The training project required smart warehouse management on an ARM board, spanning the Linux system and web-facing management functions.

actions.zh:
- 使用 C 与 Linux 开发 ARM 设备功能。
- 参与系统移植、Linux 内核编译与移植、驱动开发。
- 完成 BOA 与 CGI 的移植、配置和功能编码。
actions.en:
- Built ARM device functionality with C and Linux.
- Worked on system porting, Linux kernel builds and porting, and driver development.
- Ported and configured BOA and CGI and implemented related functions.

results.zh: 完成智慧仓储实训项目并获得 95 分。
results.en: Completed the smart warehouse training project with a score of 95.

degree.en: B.Eng. in Internet of Things Engineering

details.zh: 国家励志奖学金、三好学生、三好学生标兵、优秀毕业设计。
details.en: National Encouragement Scholarship, Outstanding Student honors, and Excellent Graduation Project.

title.zh: 第一作者：《基于 LoRa 物联网的智慧牧场系统》
title.en: First-author paper: LoRa-based IoT Smart Ranch System

title.zh: 第十一届蓝桥杯电子类省级三等奖
第一作者：《基于 LoRa 网络的 Android 智慧养殖场系统》
title.en: First-author paper: Android Smart Farm System over LoRa

title.zh: CET-4 · 普通话二级甲等 · 驾驶证 C1
title.en: CET-4 · Mandarin Level 2-A · Driver License C1
